'''Aviles Prime''' was an astronomical object<ref name="Honor Bound">{{Tales|22|Honor Bound}}</ref> located in the [[Aviles Prime system/Legends|Aviles Prime system]], within the [[Hythrope sector/Legends|Hythrope sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was the site of a [[Conference on Aviles Prime|conference]] attended by [[Oviedo Engineering]] [[Director/Legends|director]] [[Lorca Oviedo]].<ref name="Honor Bound" />
